title: Review export pinmux cleanup
question: Does the public review export still carry stale vendor-style allwinner,pinmux properties?
change: Removed allwinner,pinmux from sun60i-a733-cubie-a7s.dts uart0 pins.
Applied the same correction to the review snapshot patches 0003 and 0004.
verification: git diff --check passed for the two source DTS files before commit.
rg found no allwinner,pinmux in the A733 source files after commit.
rg found no allwinner,pinmux in exported patches 0003/0004 after cleanup.
decision: Patch cleanup only. No runtime boot was needed because this removes stale vendor binding properties and does not alter the proven lab runtime path.
next_action: Before any upstream send, regenerate the review branch cleanly and squash/fold the fixup so the mailed DTS patches contain no vendor pinmux properties.
